title: Masters of Scale
author: Reid Hoffman
subline: Surprising truths from the world's most successful entrepreneurs.
customHTML:
<svg viewBox="0 0 1600 2400" preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid slice" style="position:absolute;inset:0;width:100%;height:100%">
  <!-- An exponential growth curve: 9 dots from 10^0 to 10^9 connected by a sweeping hairline. The last (10^9) is RED, 2x size. -->
  <g transform="translate(160 1180)" font-family="'Sui','Söhne','Inter',system-ui,sans-serif" fill="none">
    <line x1="0" y1="0" x2="0" y2="-700" stroke="#4c4c4c" stroke-width="1" opacity="0.4"/>
    <line x1="0" y1="0" x2="1280" y2="0" stroke="#4c4c4c" stroke-width="1" opacity="0.4"/>
    <path d="M 0 0 Q 1280 -300 1280 -700" stroke="#cccccc" stroke-width="2"/>
    <g stroke="#cccccc" stroke-width="2" fill="#0a0a0a">
      <circle cx="0" cy="0" r="10"/>
      <circle cx="160" cy="-32" r="10"/>
      <circle cx="320" cy="-100" r="10"/>
      <circle cx="480" cy="-200" r="10"/>
      <circle cx="640" cy="-320" r="10"/>
      <circle cx="800" cy="-450" r="10"/>
      <circle cx="960" cy="-580" r="10"/>
      <circle cx="1120" cy="-680" r="10"/>
    </g>
    <circle cx="1280" cy="-700" r="18" fill="#fc1c46" stroke="#fc1c46"/>
    <g font-size="13" font-weight="500" fill="#4c4c4c" text-anchor="middle" letter-spacing="0.04em">
      <text x="0" y="40">10⁰</text>
      <text x="160" y="8">10¹</text>
      <text x="320" y="-60">10²</text>
      <text x="480" y="-160">10³</text>
      <text x="640" y="-280">10⁴</text>
      <text x="800" y="-410">10⁵</text>
      <text x="960" y="-540">10⁶</text>
      <text x="1120" y="-640">10⁷</text>
      <text x="1280" y="-660" fill="#fc1c46">10⁹</text>
    </g>
    <text x="1280" y="-740" text-anchor="middle" font-size="16" font-weight="500" fill="#fc1c46" letter-spacing="0.2em">SCALE</text>
  </g>
</svg>
rationale: The book's whole argument: scale is a curve, not a number. Nine dots along an exponential growth curve, labeled 10⁰ through 10⁹. The last dot (10⁹, the goal) is RED and 2x the size of the others. The curve is the only graphic in the upper 2/3. Title sits in the bottom 1/3, weight 500 command. Brand '10⁰ → 10⁹' in the top-left; pill '1→N' at the top — Reid's mantra that the first users come from the founder, the rest come from each other.
